assertions.title: Concurrent page access during pipeline execution

steps.expected: Act 2 session starts and domain input UI is available
steps.observed: Domain session started and input textbox plus Submit & Extract button rendered.

steps.action: Submit domain description to trigger extract
steps.expected: LLM-backed Step 3 extraction enters in-progress state
steps.observed: After submit, the button became disabled and in-progress UI state was visible while extraction request was active.
Dashboard loaded normally in a new tab while domain extraction was active.

steps.action: Navigate to Problem Space (/problem/) during same run
steps.expected: Problem Space loads normally without hang
steps.observed: Problem Space loaded normally with no timeout or blocked render.

steps.action: Navigate to Knowledge (/knowledge/) during same run
steps.expected: Knowledge page loads normally and remains interactive
steps.observed: Knowledge page loaded normally; search input was present and interactive.

evidence.consoleErrors: none from `agent-browser errors` during navigation checks; console stream showed one transient "Failed to load resource: 400" during domain extract
evidence.network: fetch http://localhost:4000/api/domain/start (27ms), fetch http://localhost:4000/api/domain/input (3ms), fetch http://localhost:4000/api/domain/extract (422ms)

frictions.description: A transient console message (Failed to load resource: 400) appeared during extract flow, even though concurrent page navigation still worked.
frictions.resolution: Not resolved in this validation run; recorded as non-blocking observation for this assertion.

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-CROSS-085): passed. During an active Act 2 extract request, Dashboard, Problem Space, and Knowledge pages all loaded without timeout/hang.
